name: icon-pop
title: IconPop
description: A small state icon — check, cross, dot, or star — that pops into place on SPRING_SMOOTH via entryScale (scale 0 → 1 plus opacity fade). Universal state primitive; the accent is earned.

files.content:
{
  "name": "icon-pop",
  "title": "IconPop",
  "description": "A small state icon — check, cross, dot, or star — that pops into place on SPRING_SMOOTH via entryScale (scale 0 → 1 plus opacity fade). Universal state primitive; the accent is earned.",
  "pickWhen": "a tiny status mark needs to land — checkmark on a feature row, error cross, live dot. Stay small; for arbitrary SVG use `draw-on`.",
  "category": "graphics",
  "tags": [
    "icon",
    "primitive",
    "state",
    "spring",
    "entrance"
  ],
  "dependencies": [
    "remotion",
    "zod",
    "react"
  ]
}
